case_title: JESUS PEREZ MOYA VS. LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MOYA, JESUS PEREZ AS TO DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA BANK OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOYA, JESUS PEREZ AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOYA, JESUS PEREZ AS TO DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MOYA, JESUS PEREZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-18-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-19-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOYA, JESUS PEREZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA BANK OF AMERICA $621.63 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $719.63, THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT WITH REGARD TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PAYMENT OF HIS 1995 PAYCHECK, AND FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF $600.00 PAID TO CLIENT. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR INTEREST LOST DUE TO DEFENDANT'S DELAY IN DEPOSITING FUNDS FOR PLAITNIFF'S RETIREMENT FUND. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER, COPY SENT TO ALL PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
REC'D ANSWER TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FILED BY DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA BANK OF AMERICA

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SC-105A ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) - DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT;AND COURT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT. HEARING 1)TO CONFIRM SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT;AND 2)TO CORRECT JUDGMENT TO DISMISS ANA LOYA, AN INDIVIDUAL, AS A PARTY DEFENDANT AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR. HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MOYA, JESUS PEREZ LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL / ANA LOYA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2008 - CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE JUDGMENT IS CORRECTED TO STATE THAT DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA AND ANA LOYA ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT CONTINUED TO JNAUARY 29, 2009; IF NO APPEARANCES, THE COURT WILL GRANT REQUEST AND ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARE PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT ORDERS ENTRY OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO ORDER OF DECEMBER 4, 2008 AS TO DEFENDANT LA RAZA CENTRO LEGAL. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUN-02-2014 (DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS INCLUDED)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
